overview: Premium single-page marketing website for LS Digital Academy — a job-oriented computer training institute in Karawal Nagar, Delhi. Features a conversion-focused hero, 11 course cards with pricing, degree programs grid, testimonials, admission and contact forms, and sticky conversion buttons (WhatsApp & Call Now).
features: Sticky navigation with mobile hamburger menu
Hero with CTAs, trust indicators, and 4.8 rating badge
11 course cards with duration, skills, pricing, and Enroll Now CTA
16 degree program badges in grid layout
About Us, Why Choose Us, and Testimonials sections
Image gallery with classroom and student placeholders
Admission and contact forms with success feedback
Floating WhatsApp button with pre-filled message
Dark Blue + Orange color scheme with smooth animations
